title: Akamai WAF - Activate Network Lists
content:
Activates network lists in Staging or Production on Akamai WAF. The playbook finishes running when the network list is active on the requested enviorment.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Akamai_WAF, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — network_list_ids: A comma-separated list of network list IDs to activate. For example: id_list1,id_list2.; env: Enviorment type to activate the network list. Can be "STAGING" or "PRODUCTION".; comment: A comment to log when activating the network lists.; notify: A comma-separated list of email addresses to notify when the network lists are activated..

Integrations/scripts used: Print, akamai-activate-network-list.

version: -1

name: Akamai WAF - Activate Network Lists
